name: Engineered Components
message: (Financial documents, counterparties, clients) We also distribute a multitude of other components that are utilized by original equipment manufacturers worldwide. Our Anchor Bolt division provides these products to countless fastener companies that operate in a range of industries, from coast to coast. Founded in 1983, ECC has continually grown in the areas of technology, market share and acquisition. Our highly-trained and tenured sales staff offers an unparalleled level of technical knowledge, service and personality. Additionally, with stocking warehouses located across the country that support a variance of VMI and in-plant material management programs, we have the ability to respond rapidly - and effectively - to our customers' needs. 1983 - Established
